subcodes.first_line: Thou didst refer to the calamities that have befallen thee and the tribulations that have descended. This is the pathway of love, and self-sacrifice is among its essential requirements [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از بلايای وارده و رزايای نازله اشاره نموده بوديد اين ره عشق است و از لوازم ذاتيه اش جانفشانی است
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
